subject: fix(pwa): stop update banner from re-appearing after applying update
body:
checkVersionUpdate() only persisted buildTime to localStorage on the
no-change path. When a version mismatch was detected, it returned true
without updating the stored value, so every subsequent visibility check
after the 30s suppression window re-detected the same "update" and
re-showed the banner. Fix: always persist buildTime before comparing.

Tags: pwa, ux, bugfix
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
